data: * Estimate does not meet NCHS standards of reliability / **While the estimate meets NCHS standards of reliability, its complement does not / -Quantity zero

Respondents were asked the degree of difficulty they experienced walking a quarter of a mile (or three city blocks) by themselves and without using any special equipment. Response categories "very difficult" and "can't do at all" are combined.
